release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 53. Adds improved Nightscout API auto-read for SAGE, accepting Sensor Change, Sensor Start, Sensor Insert and related CGM sensor events when sensor auto-read is enabled. Adds direct IOB and COB auto-read from /api/v2/properties/iob,cob while retaining treatment-based bolus fallback logic. Updates the web UI current status, insulin/bolus section, and OLED insulin screen to show IOB, COB, last bolus, last carbs, dose today, SAGE, and sensor-left information. Includes previous clean night glucose screen, random audio alarm fatigue protection, top-row time/update/Wi-Fi layout, caregiver WhatsApp routing, Wi-Fi profile improvements, and consolidated web UI structure.
